published_machine_commands.primitive_phrase: offers a published set of commands one machine can use to request work from another

radio_position_signals.primitive_phrase: uses timed radio signals from known points to estimate position

rank_by_past_preference.primitive_phrase: ranks options using patterns in earlier choices and similarities

record_lookup_before_reply.primitive_phrase: first searches a store of relevant records before composing a reply

temporary_body_instruction.primitive_phrase: delivers a temporary instruction that causes the body to make a harmless marker for practice

unsupported_automatic_text.primitive_phrase: an automatic writing system may produce unsupported statements unless constrained by evidence
